alert.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
alert.deleteMessage:
Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data.

Are you sure you want to proceed?
alert.deleteProMessage:
You currently have an active Pro subscription.

Deleting your account will not automatically cancel your subscription on Google Play or App Store, and you may be charged on the next billing date.

Please cancel your subscription in the store before deleting your account.
alert.cancelSubInfo: You can cancel your subscription in Google Play or App Store.
